select_season: Please select a season to check the records.
select_session: Please select a session to check the records.
select_season_for_ranking: Please select a season to check the rankings.
temporary_notice: This page is a temporary prototype currently under development. Design and features may change.
about_intro_desc: C-Rating (Competitive Rating) is a skill index based on Donderhiroba online competition results.
about_participation_desc: Participate in the Donderhiroba online competitions listed on the home page. Your scores will be automatically collected and reflected in your rating without additional registration.
about_logic_desc1: C-Rating is based on the Glicko-2 algorithm.
about_logic_desc2: To ensure fair skill measurement, your rating is updated by simulating matches against approximately 20 players with ratings closest to yours.
about_operation_desc: Competitions operate in short 'sessions', and multiple sessions form a 'season'. Ratings are updated at the end of each session.
